subject.description: A high-fidelity portrait of a young Vietnamese woman from An Giang in the Mekong Delta, with authentic Southern Vietnamese features, soft see-through bangs, warm smile, natural complexion, and the exact same facial identity as the reference photo. Looking directly at the camera. Photorealistic, ultra-realistic skin details, natural daylight, cinematic depth of field, professional DSLR photography, 8K quality.

eyes.direction: Looking straight into the camera lens

expression.overall: A calm, gentle, and welcoming facial expression directed at the camera

facial_features.face_shape: Oval face with soft V-shaped jawline
facial_features.eyebrows: Straight eyebrows with a gentle arch

instructions: Use the uploaded reference image as the primary facial reference
Preserve the exact facial identity from the reference image
Maintain original eye shape and spacing
Maintain original jawline and chin shape
Do not beautify, modify, or reinterpret facial features

hair.style: Long, wavy dark hair worn naturally loose, featuring soft, wispy see-through bangs framing her forehead, no headband or hair accessories
hair.effect: Voluminous, loose waves draping over her shoulders with a soft, natural texture

body.frame: Slim, petite, well-proportioned East Asian female build
body.waist: Slender, defined waistline with shirt cleanly tucked in
body.legs: Slender, straight bare legs showing below the hem of denim shorts

skin.texture: RAW photo, candid photography, natural skin texture, unretouched skin, realistic pores, high dynamic range, photorealistic, authentic indoor lifestyle photography
skin.lighting_effect: Even, natural daytime illumination accentuating smooth skin texture without heavy, harsh shadows

pose.position: Seated on a bed, looking into a large mirror (implicit selfie)
pose.overall: A casual, intimate selfie pose, with the left arm extending to hold the phone (implied by the shot frame and selfie-style perspective)

top.details: Lapel collar, a small pocket, and a button visible

accessories.prop: Mirror (the entire scene is a mirror selfie)

photography.angle: Eye-level, slightly angled from the subject's left
photography.texture: Clean, sharp detail on the subject, soft background blur
photography.lighting: Natural daylight from a nearby window, diffused and soft
photography.depth_of_field: Shallow depth of field; sharp focus on the subject, blurred background

background.wall_color: Neutral beige and dark gray accents
elements: Unmade bed with white rumpled linen
A bright window with a sheer curtain
The edge of a white wall and window frame

the_vibe.story: A quiet morning moment; taking a casual selfie before starting the day.

must_keep: The specific short brown bob hairstyle
The champagne silk pajama top with its details
The bedroom setting with unmade bed and daylight
avoid: Changing the subject's gender or identity
Major changes to the clothing (must remain champagne silk pajamas)
A chaotic or overly formal background
Tattoos, body art, or skin markings on any part of the body
Including any visible text, logos, brands, signs, watermarks, stamps, or writing on the clothes, background, or body
